backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user roles, user management (register, claim admin, profile queries), and access control integration for the Asistenku backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Asistenku React SPA, mounting the app at `#root` and loading `main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with public and app layout route trees, including all page routes, wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered closing section displaying a single quality-assurance statement about Asistenku's service.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Centered muted-background section with two statements explaining Asistenku's service unit conversion philosophy.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the Asistenku icon logo, copyright text, and navigation links to WhatsApp concierge, internal login, and partner portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky responsive header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation, and a "Masuk" button that navigates to `/client-login`.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Two-column hero section with a bold two-line heading, description text, CTA buttons for service selection and WhatsApp contact, and a hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Centered section listing the four-step Asistenku support process with a closing statement about client decision management.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Centered call-to-action section inviting users to join the Asistenku team with a button linking to the partner information page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: A layout shell for dashboard pages that accepts a custom header and children, rendering them within a max-width container with a sticky footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Renders a 2-column accordion grid of four service tier cards (TENANG, RAPI, FOKUS, JAGA), each showing an emoji, title, short description, price, and expandable full description.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: A simple static section component displaying a centered heading and paragraph about timely, parallel task execution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls or an anonymous actor otherwise, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and expose the current identity via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend operations including admin claim status, user registration (admin, client, partner), and fetching user role/principal data via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including Asistenku brand colors (teal, navy) and utility classes for those colors.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: A minimal authenticated app layout that renders a full-height slate background with a TanStack Router Outlet as the main content area.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientLogin.tsx: Client login page that handles Internet Identity authentication and then checks the user's role to redirect to the client dashboard or show a not-registered message with a registration link.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: A client registration page that requires Internet Identity login before submitting a form with name, email, WhatsApp, and company fields. Displays success (with client ID) or error feedback after calling the registerClient mutation.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/finance.tsx: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a future finance dashboard page.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: An internal admin dashboard page with mock data for users, tickets, and history, providing UI for managing user roles/statuses, support tickets, and activity logs via collapsible sections and dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: A client dashboard page showing active services, task summary counts, and a filterable task list with status badges. Uses dummy/mock data and includes a modal trigger for creating new tasks.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: A partner dashboard page displaying wallet balance, task summary, and collapsible task sections (assigned, in-progress, revision, QA, history) using mock data. Also shows partner profile, skills, and bank account info.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The public home page that composes several section components (Hero, HowWeSupport, TimelyDelivery, ConversionStatement, ServiceCards, JoinTeam, Closing) into a single landing page layout.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: An internal staff portal page supporting Internet Identity login, first-time admin claiming, internal user registration, and role-based navigation to the internal dashboard. Restricts access to allowed roles with active status.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: A partner portal page that allows users to log in via Internet Identity, register as a partner with name/email/WhatsApp/city, and access the partner dashboard after a role check. Shows success/error feedback for registration and dashboard access attempts.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: A static informational page describing the Asistenku Partner program, covering how partners work, level/verification system, transparent work standards, and a CTA to register or contact support.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Exports a single utility function `smoothScrollTo` that scrolls the page smoothly to a DOM element by its ID.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for the Asistenku Portal, documenting architectural notes, known issues, and five pending feature requests focused on opening ICP registration to all authenticated users while restricting approval to admin roles.
